tasks.title: Lazy-load public engagement widgets
tasks.description: The public root route no longer statically includes heavy chat and popup widget modules in the initial homepage bundle, while existing public engagement behavior remains available after the delayed engagement layer mounts.
steps: Inspect generated client chunks and confirm GippyChat is emitted outside the primary index-*.js chunk or is dynamically imported from the root.

tasks.title: Deduplicate catalog products with React Query
tasks.description: Homepage and chat catalog consumers share one cached React Query request while useCatalogProducts preserves its current public return shape for existing UI code.
steps: Runtime or code inspection confirms useCatalogProducts() uses a stable React Query queryKey and no longer performs an uncached fetch in a local mount effect.

tasks.title: Defer chat data until open
tasks.description: GippyChat does not fetch chatbot tree data or trigger catalog-dependent recommendation work while the widget is closed, and it still loads the same chat options after the user opens the widget.
steps: Browser/network smoke check confirms chatbot_tree_nodes is not requested before opening chat and is requested after chat opens.

depends_on: Deduplicate catalog products with React Query

tasks.title: Limit popup host query
tasks.description: PopupHost fetches only the fields it renders or needs for dismissal checks and uses a bounded active-popup result set before client-side dismissal filtering.
steps: Code inspection confirms the query does not use .select("*") and includes .limit(...).

tasks.title: Verify homepage freeze remediation
tasks.description: The completed change has fresh static and runtime evidence that homepage initial load is lighter and the public widgets still work when invoked.
steps: Start a local preview build and smoke-test / plus chat-open behavior with browser automation when available.
Compare build output against the audit baseline: original primary client chunk was approximately 920.79 kB with heavy Gippy assets emitted from the initial import path.

depends_on: Deduplicate catalog products with React Query

patterns: React.lazy and Suspense are already used by src/routes/admin.tsx and src/components/admin/AdminPage.tsx.
QueryClient is created in src/router.tsx and provided in src/routes/__root.tsx.
PublicEngagementLayer currently mounts GippyChat and PopupHost from src/routes/__root.tsx after a 750ms delay.
nonGoals: No image format conversion in this bead.
